controls.control_objective: To ensure be called the reserve bank of india [lending to micro, small & medium enterprises (msme) sector] directions, 2017
controls.control_description:
1.1 Short Title and Commencement
a) These Directions shall be called the Reserve Bank of India [Lending to Micro, Small
& Medium Enterprises (MSME) Sector] Directions, 2017.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be called the reserve bank of india [lending to micro, small & medium enterprises (msme) sector] directions, 2017

controls.control_objective: To ensure come into effect on the day they are placed on the official website of the reserve bank of india
controls.control_description:
b) These Directions shall come into effect on the day they are placed on the official
website of the Reserve Bank of India.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to come into effect on the day they are placed on the official website of the reserve bank of india

controls.control_objective: To ensure apply to all scheduled commercial banks (excluding regional rural banks rrbs)
controls.control_description:
1.2 Applicability
The provisions of these Directions shall apply to all Scheduled Commercial Banks (excluding
Regional Rural Banks RRBs).
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to apply to all scheduled commercial banks (excluding regional rural banks rrbs)

controls.control_objective: To ensure bear the meanings assigned to them as below: a) the msmed act, 2006 means 'micro, small and medium enterprises development (msmed) act, 2006' as notified by the government of india on june 16, 2006 and the amendments
controls.control_description:
1.3 Definitions/ Clarifications
In these Directions, unless the context otherwise requires, the terms herein shall bear the
meanings assigned to them as below:
a) The MSMED Act, 2006 means 'Micro, Small and Medium Enterprises Development
(MSMED) Act, 2006' as notified by the Government of India on June 16, 2006 and
the amendments, if any, carried out therein by the Government of India from time to
time.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to bear the meanings assigned to them as below: a) the msmed act, 2006 means 'micro, small and medium enterprises development (msmed) act, 2006' as notified by the government of india on june 16, 2006 and the amendments

controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to the sectors specified in the master directions - reserve bank of india (priority sector lending - targets and classification) directions, 2025 dated m

controls.control_objective: To ensure have the same meaning as given in the master directions - reserve bank of india (priority sector lending - targets and classification) directions, 202
controls.control_description:
d) 'Adjusted Net Bank Credit (ANBC)' shall have the same meaning as given in the
Master Directions - Reserve Bank of India (Priority Sector Lending - Targets and
Classification) Directions, 2025 dated March 24, 2025, as updated from time to time.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have the same meaning as given in the master directions - reserve bank of india (priority sector lending - targets and classification) directions, 202

controls.control_objective: To ensure to register online on the udyam registration portal and obtain 'udyam registration certificate'
controls.control_description:
2.2 All the above enterprises are required to register online on the Udyam Registration portal
and obtain 'Udyam Registration Certificate'.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to to register online on the udyam registration portal and obtain 'udyam registration certificate'

controls.control_objective: To ensure be guided by the classification recorded in the udyam registration certificate (urc)
controls.control_description:
For PSL purposes banks shall be guided by the
classification recorded in the Udyam Registration Certificate (URC).
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be guided by the classification recorded in the udyam registration certificate (urc)

controls.control_objective: To ensure be treated at par with udyam registration certificate for the purpose of availing priority sector lending benefits
controls.control_description:
2.4 The certificate issued on Udyam Assist Portal (UAP) to Informal Micro Enterprises
(IMEs) shall be treated at par with Udyam Registration Certificate for the purpose of availing
Priority Sector Lending benefits.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be treated at par with udyam registration certificate for the purpose of availing priority sector lending benefits

controls.control_objective: To ensure be treated as micro enterprises for the purpose of psl classification
controls.control_description:
IMEs with an Udyam Assist Certificate shall be treated as
micro enterprises for the purpose of PSL classification.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be treated as micro enterprises for the purpose of psl classification

controls.control_objective: To ensure adhere to the targets/sub-targets for lending to the msme sector and related aspects as laid down in the master directions - reserve bank of india (pr
controls.control_description:
Scheduled Commercial Banks shall adhere to the targets/sub-targets for lending to the
MSME sector and related aspects as laid down in the Master Directions - Reserve Bank of
India (Priority Sector Lending - Targets and Classification) Directions, 2025 dated March 24,
2025, as updated from time to time.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to adhere to the targets/sub-targets for lending to the msme sector and related aspects as laid down in the master directions - reserve bank of india (pr

controls.control_objective: To ensure , on the basis of good track record and financial position of the mse units, increase the limit to dispense with the collateral requirement for loans
controls.control_description:
(b) Banks may, on the basis of good track record and financial position of the MSE
units, increase the limit to dispense with the collateral requirement for loans up to
₹25 lakh as per their internal policy.
controls.implementation_method: Implement technical controls to configure system to , on the basis of good track record and financial position of the mse units, increase the limit to dispense with the collateral requirement for loans

controls.control_objective: To ensure avail the benefit of credit guarantee scheme cover
controls.control_description:
(c) Banks may avail the benefit of Credit Guarantee Scheme cover, where
applicable.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to avail the benefit of credit guarantee scheme cover

controls.control_objective: To ensure issue general credit cards to individuals/entities sanctioned working capital facilities for non-farm entrepreneurial activities which are eligible fo
controls.control_description:
4.3 General Credit Card (GCC) Facility
Banks which are eligible to issue credit cards under the Master Direction -Credit Card and
Debit card- Issuance and Conduct Directions, dated April 21, 2022 (as updated from time to
time), may issue General Credit Cards to individuals/entities sanctioned working capital
facilities for non-farm entrepreneurial activities which are eligible for classification under the
priority sector guidelines.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to issue general credit cards to individuals/entities sanctioned working capital facilities for non-farm entrepreneurial activities which are eligible fo

controls.control_objective: To ensure be as per the board approved policies of the banks, within the overall framework laid down by reserve bank
controls.control_description:
The terms and conditions of the credit facilities extended in the
form of GCC shall be as per the Board approved policies of the banks, within the overall
framework laid down by Reserve Bank.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to be as per the board approved policies of the banks, within the overall framework laid down by reserve bank

controls.control_objective: To ensure apply
controls.control_description:
Guidelines on collateral free lending for micro and
small units issued from time to time shall apply.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to apply

controls.control_objective: To ensure adhere to the instructions on reporting gcc data as issued by rbi from time to time
controls.control_description:
Banks shall adhere to the instructions on
reporting GCC data as issued by RBI from time to time.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to adhere to the instructions on reporting gcc data as issued by rbi from time to time

controls.control_objective: To ensure come into force for all loans to mse borrowers sanctioned or renewed on or after april 01, 2026
controls.control_description: 1 Modified vide Lending to Micro, Small & Medium Enterprises (MSME) Sector (Amendment) Directions, 2026 dated February 09, 2026 and the amendment shall come into force for all loans to MSE borrowers sanctioned or renewed on or after April 01, 2026.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to come into force for all loans to mse borrowers sanctioned or renewed on or after april 01, 2026

controls.control_objective: To ensure review and tune their lending policies to the mse sector by incorporating therein the following provisions so as to facilitate timely and adequate ava
controls.control_description:
In accordance with the guidelines, banks shall review and tune their lending policies
to the MSE sector by incorporating therein the following provisions so as to facilitate timely
and adequate availability of credit to viable MSE borrowers especially during the need of
funds in unforeseen circumstances:
i) To extend standby credit facility in case of term loans.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to review and tune their lending policies to the mse sector by incorporating therein the following provisions so as to facilitate timely and adequate ava

controls.control_objective: To ensure be more than 14 working days
controls.control_description:
iv) Timeline for credit decisions for loans up to ₹25 lakh to units in the MSE borrowers
shall not be more than 14 working days.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be more than 14 working days

controls.control_objective: To ensure be as per the board approved sanction time norms
controls.control_description:
For loans above the aforementioned limit,
timelines shall be as per the Board approved sanction time norms.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be as per the board approved sanction time norms

controls.control_objective: To ensure be displayed under a separate tab prominently on the bank's website
controls.control_description:
All credit related
information pertaining to MSMEs including timelines for credit decisions, indicative
document checklist etc., shall be displayed under a separate tab prominently on the
bank's website.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be displayed under a separate tab prominently on the bank's website

controls.control_objective: To ensure 4, 2009 to do the following: a) put in place loan policies governing extension of credit facilities, restructuring/rehabilitation policy for revival o
controls.control_description:
102/06.04.01/2008-09 dated May 4, 2009 to do the
following:
a) put in place loan policies governing extension of credit facilities,
Restructuring/Rehabilitation policy for revival of potentially viable sick units /
enterprises (now read with guidelines on Framework for Revival and
Rehabilitation of Micro, Small and Medium Enterprises issued on March 17,
2016) and non- discretionary One Time Settlement scheme for recovery of non-
performing loans for the MSE sector, with the approval of the Board of Directors
and
b) give wide publicity to the One-Time settlement scheme implemented by them,
by placing it on the bank's website and through other possible modes of
dissemination.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to 4, 2009 to do the following: a) put in place loan policies governing extension of credit facilities, restructuring/rehabilitation policy for revival o

controls.control_objective: To ensure allow reasonable time to the borrowers to submit the application and also make payment of the dues in order to extend the benefits of the scheme to el
controls.control_description:
They may allow reasonable time to the borrowers to submit the
application and also make payment of the dues in order to extend the benefits
of the scheme to eligible borrowers.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to allow reasonable time to the borrowers to submit the application and also make payment of the dues in order to extend the benefits of the scheme to el

controls.control_objective: To ensure 29, 2015 had notified a 'framework for revival and rehabilitation of micro, small and medium enterprises' to provide a simpler and faster mechanism to
controls.control_description:
4.6 Framework for Revival and Rehabilitation of MSMEs
The Ministry of Micro, Small and Medium Enterprises, Government of India, vide their
Gazette Notification dated May 29, 2015 had notified a 'Framework for Revival and
Rehabilitation of Micro, Small and Medium Enterprises' to provide a simpler and faster
mechanism to address the stress in the accounts of MSMEs and to facilitate the promotion
and development of MSMEs.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to 29, 2015 had notified a 'framework for revival and rehabilitation of micro, small and medium enterprises' to provide a simpler and faster mechanism to

controls.control_objective: To ensure also voluntarily initiate proceedings under this framework iii) committee approach to be adopted for deciding corrective action plan iv) timelines hav
controls.control_description:
The salient features of the Framework are as under:
i) Before a loan account of an MSME turns into a Non-Performing Asset (NPA), banks
or creditors should identify incipient stress in the account by creating three sub-
categories under the Special Mention Account (SMA) category as given in the
Framework
ii) Any MSME borrower may also voluntarily initiate proceedings under this Framework
iii) Committee approach to be adopted for deciding corrective action plan
iv) Timelines have been fixed for taking various decisions under the Framework
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to also voluntarily initiate proceedings under this framework iii) committee approach to be adopted for deciding corrective action plan iv) timelines hav

controls.control_objective: To ensure put in place a structured mechanism to monitor the entire gamut of credit related issues pertaining to the mse sector
controls.control_description:
4.7 Structured Mechanism for monitoring the credit growth to the MSE sector
Banks shall put in place a structured mechanism to monitor the entire gamut of credit related
issues pertaining to the MSE sector.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to put in place a structured mechanism to monitor the entire gamut of credit related issues pertaining to the mse sector

controls.control_objective: To ensure implement the following: i) credit proposal tracking system (cpts): banks shall put in place a cpts/ equivalent tracking mechanism to facilitate centr
controls.control_description:
Accordingly, banks shall implement the following:
i) Credit Proposal Tracking System (CPTS): Banks shall put in place a CPTS/
equivalent tracking mechanism to facilitate central registration and a system of e-
tracking of all MSME loan applications.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to implement the following: i) credit proposal tracking system (cpts): banks shall put in place a cpts/ equivalent tracking mechanism to facilitate centr

controls.control_objective: To ensure automatically generate an acknowledgement of the application, having a unique application serial number for both physical and online applications
controls.control_description:
This mechanism shall automatically generate
an acknowledgement of the application, having a unique application serial number for
both physical and online applications.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to automatically generate an acknowledgement of the application, having a unique application serial number for both physical and online applications

controls.control_objective: To ensure also be ensured that the acknowledgement and status of the application is sent automatically to the applicants
controls.control_description:
Further, it shall also be ensured that the
acknowledgement and status of the application is sent automatically to the
applicants.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also be ensured that the acknowledgement and status of the application is sent automatically to the applicants

controls.control_objective: To ensure furnish the msme borrowers with an indicative checklist of documents required for processing the loan application at the time of applying for the loan
controls.control_description:
ii) Indicative check list of documents: Banks shall furnish the MSME borrowers with an
indicative checklist of documents required for processing the loan application at the
time of applying for the loan.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to furnish the msme borrowers with an indicative checklist of documents required for processing the loan application at the time of applying for the loan

controls.control_objective: To ensure monitor the loan application disposal process and pendency beyond sanction time norms at appropriate levels on a quarterly basis
controls.control_description:
iii) Monitoring the loan application disposal process: Banks shall monitor the loan
application disposal process and pendency beyond sanction time norms at
appropriate levels on a quarterly basis.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to monitor the loan application disposal process and pendency beyond sanction time norms at appropriate levels on a quarterly basis

controls.control_objective: To ensure be displayed by banks on their websites in the format specified in (annex i) within one month from the end of the preceding quarter
controls.control_description:
The position in this regard shall be displayed
by banks on their websites in the format specified in (Annex I) within one month from
the end of the preceding quarter.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be displayed by banks on their websites in the format specified in (annex i) within one month from the end of the preceding quarter

controls.control_objective: To ensure , within the board approved sanction time norms, convey to the msme borrowers in writing the main reason/reasons which, in the opinion of the bank aft
controls.control_description:
iv) Reasons for rejection of loan applications: Banks shall, within the Board approved
sanction time norms, convey to the MSME borrowers in writing the main
reason/reasons which, in the opinion of the bank after due consideration, have led to
rejection of the loan applications.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to , within the board approved sanction time norms, convey to the msme borrowers in writing the main reason/reasons which, in the opinion of the bank aft

controls.control_objective: To ensure implement a system-driven comprehensive performance management information system (mis) at branches and supervisory levels (region, zone, head office)
controls.control_description:
v) Comprehensive Performance MIS: Banks shall implement a system-driven
comprehensive performance management information system (MIS) at branches and
supervisory levels (region, zone, head office).
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to implement a system-driven comprehensive performance management information system (mis) at branches and supervisory levels (region, zone, head office)

controls.control_objective: To ensure be critically evaluated on a regular basis
controls.control_description:
The Performance should be critically
evaluated on a regular basis.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be critically evaluated on a regular basis

controls.control_objective: To ensure also be reviewed by the board of the banks at periodic intervals
controls.control_description:
The credit flow to the sector shall also be reviewed by
the Board of the banks at periodic intervals.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also be reviewed by the board of the banks at periodic intervals

controls.control_objective: To ensure 9, 2013
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to 9, 2013

controls.control_description:
Banks may take care to train the
officials posted in such branches appropriately.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to take care to train the officials posted in such branches appropriately

controls.control_objective: To ensure decide the need to have similar committees at cluster/district levels
controls.control_description:
The committees may decide the need to have similar committees at
cluster/district levels.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to decide the need to have similar committees at cluster/district levels

controls.control_objective: To ensure continue to follow their commitments as hitherto under the code of bank's commitment to micro and small enterprises
controls.control_description:
While BCSBI has initiated the process of its
dissolution, banks may continue to follow their commitments as hitherto under the Code of
Bank's Commitment to Micro and Small Enterprises.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to continue to follow their commitments as hitherto under the code of bank's commitment to micro and small enterprises

controls.control_objective: To ensure also be trained through customised training programs to meet the specific needs of the sector
controls.control_description:
The bank staff should also be trained through customised training programs to meet the
specific needs of the sector.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also be trained through customised training programs to meet the specific needs of the sector

controls.control_objective: To ensure mean a cluster identified by the ministry of micro, small and medium enterprises, government of india or the respective state /ut governments
controls.control_description:
5.5 Cluster Approach
A cluster shall mean a cluster identified by the Ministry of Micro, Small and Medium
Enterprises, Government of India or the respective State /UT Governments.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to mean a cluster identified by the ministry of micro, small and medium enterprises, government of india or the respective state /ut governments

controls.control_objective: To ensure display the list of these clusters on their portals and update them semi-annually as at end-march and end-september
controls.control_description:
SLBC/UTLBC
Convenor banks shall display the list of these clusters on their portals and update them
semi-annually as at end-March and end-September.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to display the list of these clusters on their portals and update them semi-annually as at end-march and end-september

controls.control_objective: To ensure be obtained directly from the respective authorities
controls.control_description:
The updated list of clusters identified by
Ministry of MSME may be accessed from Ministry's official website, while information on
clusters recognized by State Governments/Union Territories shall be obtained directly from
the respective authorities.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be obtained directly from the respective authorities

controls.control_objective: To ensure promote 'credit-linkage' in all clusters located within the district
controls.control_description:
i) The lead bank of a district shall promote 'credit-linkage' in all clusters located within the
district.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to promote 'credit-linkage' in all clusters located within the district

controls.control_objective: To ensure include but not be restricted to the following measures: • assessing the credit requirements of the mse units in the clusters and addressing their cre
controls.control_description:
The initiatives under promotion of the credit-linkage, shall include but not be
restricted to the following measures:
• Assessing the credit requirements of the MSE units in the clusters and addressing
their credit needs directly or facilitating their linkage with other banks operating in the
area for credit proposals.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to include but not be restricted to the following measures: • assessing the credit requirements of the mse units in the clusters and addressing their cre

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure that the credit needs of clusters are appropriately included in the exercise of preparation of branch/block level plans so that the same can be
controls.control_description:
ii) The banks shall ensure that the credit needs of clusters are appropriately included in the
exercise of preparation of branch/block level plans so that the same can be aggregated by
lead banks to form the District Credit Plan (DCP) and subsequently by SLBC /UTLBC
Convenor banks to prepare the Annual Credit Plan (ACP).
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure that the credit needs of clusters are appropriately included in the exercise of preparation of branch/block level plans so that the same can be

controls.control_objective: To ensure disclose the credit extended to clusters in the state/ut on their portal every quarter in the prescribed format (annex ii)
controls.control_description:
iii) The SLBC /UTLBC Convenor banks shall disclose the credit extended to clusters in the
State/UT on their portal every quarter in the prescribed format (Annex II).
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to disclose the credit extended to clusters in the state/ut on their portal every quarter in the prescribed format (annex ii)

controls.control_objective: To ensure exceed forty-five days from the date of acceptance or the day of deemed acceptance
controls.control_description:
The period agreed upon between the supplier and the buyer shall not
exceed forty-five days from the date of acceptance or the day of deemed
acceptance.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to exceed forty-five days from the date of acceptance or the day of deemed acceptance

controls.control_objective: To ensure be liable to pay compound interest with monthly rests to the supplier on the amount from the appointed day or, on the date agreed on, at three times o
controls.control_description:
ii) In case the buyer fails to make payment of the amount to the supplier, he shall be
liable to pay compound interest with monthly rests to the supplier on the amount from
the appointed day or, on the date agreed on, at three times of the Bank Rate notified
by Reserve Bank.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be liable to pay compound interest with monthly rests to the supplier on the amount from the appointed day or, on the date agreed on, at three times o

controls.control_objective: To ensure be liable to pay the interest as advised at (ii) above
controls.control_description:
iii) For any goods supplied or services rendered by the supplier, the buyer shall be liable
to pay the interest as advised at (ii) above.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be liable to pay the interest as advised at (ii) above

controls.control_objective: To ensure be made to the micro and small enterprises facilitation council, constituted by the respective state government
controls.control_description:
iv) In case of dispute with regard to any amount due, a reference shall be made to the
Micro and Small Enterprises Facilitation Council, constituted by the respective State
Government.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be made to the micro and small enterprises facilitation council, constituted by the respective state government
